query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, c.title as course_title, c.code, l.videoUrl 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE l.videoUrl IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY c.id, l.order;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, c.title as course_title, c.code, l.videoUrl 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE l.videoUrl IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY c.id, l.order;
